name: Crockpot French Onion Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons instant beef bouillon, or 6 cups hot water
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, cook onions in butter until lightly browned.
2. Pour off some fat from the skillet and add remaining ingredients (bouillon, water, Worcestershire sauce, and salt) to the skillet with the onions.
3. Transfer the mixture to the crockpot and cover.
4. Cook on low for 4-6 hours or until tender.
5. Serve hot topped with toasted French bread and sprinkled with Parmesan cheese.
Recipe may be doubled and kept hot in the crockpot.
